PUPPET_FILE
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# A class with parameters')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('version')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''latest'')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('version')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''latest'')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('version')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''latest'')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# Space is not allowed')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiErrorElement:'[' unexpected
          PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('version')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''latest'')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# defined types')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  Puppet: TYPE_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(DEFINE)('define')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('vhost')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('port')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('docroot')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('servername')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('vhost_name')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: INCLUDE_CLASS_STATEMENT
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('require')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  Puppet: TYPE_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(DEFINE)('define')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('vhost')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('port')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('docroot')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('servername')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('title')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('vhost_name')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''*'')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: INCLUDE_CLASS_STATEMENT
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('include')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiComment(COMMENT)('# contains Package['httpd'] and Service['httpd']')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: INCLUDE_CLASS_STATEMENT
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('include')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('apache::params')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiComment(COMMENT)('# contains common config settings')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('vhost_dir')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('apache::params::vhost_dir')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('file')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('vhost_dir')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)('/')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('servername')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('.conf"')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
            PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('content')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
                  PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                    PsiElement(NAME)('template')
                  PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
                    PsiElement(()('(')
                    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''apache/vhost-default.conf.erb'')
                    PsiElement())(')')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiComment(COMMENT)('# This template can access all of the parameters and variables from above.')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('owner')
                PsiWhiteSpace('   ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''www'')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('group')
                PsiWhiteSpace('   ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''www'')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('mode')
                PsiWhiteSpace('    ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''644'')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('require')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
                  PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                    PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Package')
                  PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
                    PsiElement([)('[')
                    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''httpd'')
                    PsiElement(])(']')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('notify')
                PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
                  PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                    PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Service')
                  PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
                    PsiElement([)('[')
                    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''httpd'')
                    PsiElement(])(']')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# lambdas')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
      PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
      PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('j')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('j')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
